category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Angolan market (IANORQ conformity, NA/IEC standards, Portuguese-language documentation).

title.en: China-to-Angola LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具出口安哥拉：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具出口安哥拉：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Angolan market-access requirements: IANORQ conformity assessment and adopted NA/IEC standards (IEC 60598 luminaire safety, IEC 62560/62471 lamp and photobiological safety), the national energy-labelling programme, INACOM radio approval for wireless products, Portuguese-language documentation, and the in-country importer requirement, versus Chinese GB/GB-T standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与安哥拉市场准入要求对照：IANORQ 合格评定及采用的 NA/IEC 标准（IEC 60598 灯具安全、IEC 62560/62471 灯泡与光生物安全）、国家能效标识计划、无线产品的 INACOM 无线电核准、葡萄牙语文件及在地进口商要求，并与中国 GB/GB-T 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與安哥拉市場准入要求對照：IANORQ 合格評定及採用的 NA/IEC 標準（IEC 60598 燈具安全、IEC 62560/62471 燈泡與光生物安全）、國家能效標識計劃、無線產品的 INACOM 無線電核准、葡萄牙語文件及在地進口商要求，並與中國 GB/GB-T 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Angola does not operate an EU-style harmonised CE regime; market access is governed by IANORQ conformity assessment, import inspection, sector regulators (INACOM for radio), and applicable Angolan law. Exporters, importers, and in-country representatives should verify current Angolan requirements, adopted NA/IEC standards, energy-labelling rules, and documentation-language obligations with qualified professionals and the relevant Angolan authorities before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。安哥拉不实施欧盟式协调 CE 制度；市场准入由 IANORQ 合格评定、进口检验、行业监管机构（无线电由 INACOM 负责）及适用的安哥拉法律管辖。出口商、进口商及在地代表在出货前，应与合格专业人士及相关安哥拉主管机关核验现行安哥拉要求、采用的 NA/IEC 标准、能效标识规则及文件语言义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。安哥拉不實施歐盟式協調 CE 制度；市場准入由 IANORQ 合格評定、進口檢驗、行業監管機構（無線電由 INACOM 負責）及適用的安哥拉法律管轄。出口商、進口商及在地代表在出貨前，應與合格專業人士及相關安哥拉主管機關核驗現行安哥拉要求、採用的 NA/IEC 標準、能效標識規則及文件語言義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Angola should expect requirements driven by IANORQ (Instituto Angolano de Normalizacao e Qualidade), which adopts IEC standards as Angolan NA standards and operates conformity and import-inspection processes for regulated products: electrical safety to NA/IEC 60598 (luminaires) and NA/IEC 62560 (self-ballasted lamps); photobiological safety to NA/IEC 62471 where applicable; and the national energy-labelling programme for lighting. Wireless/smart luminaires additionally require INACOM (Instituto Angolano das Comunicacoes) radio approval. Technical and safety documentation, labels, and instructions generally need to be in Portuguese, and a local in-country importer/representative is required to clear and place goods. Angola does NOT have an EU-style horizontal RoHS, REACH-SVHC, or Ecodesign regime — there is no direct Angolan equivalent restricting the 10 RoHS substances or mandating SVHC supply-chain notification; the China RoHS disclosure label and CCC certification do not by themselves satisfy Angolan conformity, and the 220 V / 50 Hz grid is similar to China's single-phase nominal.
answer_first.zh: 出口安哥拉的中国 LED 灯具制造商应预期由 IANORQ（安哥拉标准化与质量研究所）驱动的要求——该机构将 IEC 标准采用为安哥拉 NA 标准，并对受管制产品实施合格评定与进口检验流程：电气安全依 NA/IEC 60598（灯具）及 NA/IEC 62560（自镇流灯）；适用时光生物安全依 NA/IEC 62471；以及照明产品的国家能效标识计划。无线/智能灯具还须取得 INACOM（安哥拉通信研究所）无线电核准。技术与安全文件、标签及说明书通常须以葡萄牙语提供，且须由在地进口商/代表完成清关与投放。安哥拉没有欧盟式的横向 RoHS、REACH-SVHC 或生态设计制度——不存在直接限制 10 项 RoHS 物质或强制 SVHC 供应链通报的安哥拉对应规定；中国 RoHS 披露标识及 CCC 认证本身不满足安哥拉合格评定，且 220 V / 50 Hz 电网与中国单相额定值相似。
answer_first.zht: 出口安哥拉的中國 LED 燈具製造商應預期由 IANORQ（安哥拉標準化與質量研究所）驅動的要求——該機構將 IEC 標準採用為安哥拉 NA 標準，並對受管制產品實施合格評定與進口檢驗流程：電氣安全依 NA/IEC 60598（燈具）及 NA/IEC 62560（自鎮流燈）；適用時光生物安全依 NA/IEC 62471；以及照明產品的國家能效標識計劃。無線/智能燈具還須取得 INACOM（安哥拉通信研究所）無線電核准。技術與安全文件、標籤及說明書通常須以葡萄牙語提供，且須由在地進口商/代表完成清關與投放。安哥拉沒有歐盟式的橫向 RoHS、REACH-SVHC 或生態設計制度——不存在直接限制 10 項 RoHS 物質或強制 SVHC 供應鏈通報的安哥拉對應規定；中國 RoHS 披露標識及 CCC 認證本身不滿足安哥拉合格評定，且 220 V / 50 Hz 電網與中國單相額定值相似。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or on any change to IANORQ adopted standards, the Angolan energy-labelling programme, or INACOM radio rules
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official or primary URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. Angola adopts IEC standards as NA standards; the specific NA reference numbers, energy-labelling scope, and INACOM approval triggers must be re-verified against IANORQ and INACOM sources on each review cycle, as Angolan conformity practice can differ from a pure EU/CE model.
